name: The party member who hates you
description:
Stuck in the woods with the party member who hates you

Via your party member who no matter what you do there a fault and every misfortune is because of you.

You should be able to make a reason she hates you for I don’t think I railroaded it to much

Here’s a poem about clits brought to you by ChatGPT

The Sacred Spark

A hidden pearl, a sacred flame,

Untouched by shame, untamed by name.

A crown of pleasure, fierce and sweet,

The rhythm calls, the pulse repeats.

Lips and tongue, a lover’s art,

A map to chart the beating heart.

Each shiver, gasp, a whispered hymn,

A universe found deep within.

So soft, so bold, it takes the lead,

A trembling ache, a burning need.

In every touch, the stars align—

An altar where the gods recline.

Feedback and requests are appreciated thanks
